# Card-Ex

> Card-Ex by Tagex.app is a premium digital business portfolio platform. Create stunning, shareable digital business cards with built-in analytics, team management, AI assistants, and a full networking ecosystem.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Card-Ex and the digital business portfolio platform.
- [Sign in](/auth): Account sign in for Card-Ex members.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a new Card-Ex account.
- [Distributor Locator](/locator): Find Card-Ex partner locations and distributors.

## Optional

- [Team Directory](/team/): Public team directory landing pages by organization slug (e.g. /team/your-org).
- [Public Card](/c/): Published digital business cards by short slug (e.g. /c/abc123) — also accessible at the root via custom slug.
